case_title: CARLOS RODRIGUEZ VS. MENDORELL CLEANING SERVICE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT MENDORELL CLEANING SERVICE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDORELL CLEANING SERVICE, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LLC $29,053.19 PRINCIPAL, $357.09 INTEREST, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,616.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
